mechanism: 6-7% GDP fiscal deficit sustains ~$1.4-1.6T annual corporate profits via Kalecki profit identity, suppressing defaults by 100-150bp of spread compression and making all historical cycle timing analogues unreliable due to no precedent for this deficit magnitude alongside a mature credit cycle.
regime_dependence: Active as long as fiscal deficit remains above ~4-5% GDP. Unprecedented — no prior cycle had this magnitude of fiscal support.
